description: Curated source catalogue for Architecture as Code GitHub issue drafts. Each entry documents an authoritative reference used in the manuscript.

sources.title: Architecture as Code: The Next Evolution
sources.summary: ThoughtWorks Technology Radar entry that positions Architecture as Code as an emerging practice for encoding and automating architectural decisions.

sources.title: Governance as Code – Thoughtworks Technology Radar
sources.summary: Thoughtworks Technology Radar entry describing the practice of encoding governance policies and enforcement rules as version-controlled code.

sources.title: Git Workflows for Architecture as Code
sources.summary: Atlassian guide covering branching strategies and pull-request workflows applicable to architecture repository management.

sources.title: About protected branches
sources.summary: GitHub documentation explaining branch protection rules, required status checks, and review requirements for controlled merges.

sources.title: Introduction to Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
sources.summary: HashiCorp's introductory guide to Terraform, covering declarative configuration, plan and apply cycles, and state management fundamentals.

sources.title: Cloud Native Definition
sources.summary: CNCF's canonical definition of cloud native technologies, covering containers, microservices, and dynamic orchestration.

sources.title: State of Cloud Native Development 2024
sources.summary: CNCF annual survey reporting on adoption rates, tooling preferences, and operational challenges across cloud native teams globally.

sources.title: The Site Reliability Workbook: Practical Ways to Implement SRE
sources.summary: O'Reilly workbook from Google SRE team providing practical guidance on reliability engineering, error budgets, and automation-first operations.

sources.title: AWS Cloud Development Kit (CDK) Developer Guide
sources.summary: Amazon's official CDK guide covering infrastructure-as-code patterns using familiar programming languages to define and provision AWS resources.

sources.title: Policy as Code Overview
sources.summary: Open Policy Agent project documentation covering Rego policy language, admission control patterns, and integration with CI/CD pipelines.

sources.title: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organisations – NIST SP 800-53
sources.summary: NIST catalogue of security and privacy controls providing a framework for implementing and assessing control effectiveness in information systems.

sources.title: Design multi-stage release pipelines with approvals
sources.summary: Microsoft Learn guide for configuring multi-stage Azure DevOps pipelines with gates, approvals, and environment promotion controls.

sources.title: Kubernetes Documentation: Concepts
sources.summary: Kubernetes project documentation covering cluster architecture, workload management, services, and configuration primitives.

sources.title: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management
sources.summary: International standard specifying requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an information security management system.

sources.title: Testing Infrastructure as Code Programs
sources.summary: Pulumi guide covering unit, integration, and property-based testing patterns for infrastructure-as-code programmes.

sources.title: Securing Terraform State
sources.summary: HashiCorp documentation on Terraform state file security, covering encryption at rest, access controls, and remote backend configuration.
